QF.id: VIII Introduction to Clearing and Settlement System_7

question.text: Which clearing member category can clear trades for other trading members in addition to their own?

answer.text: TM-CM (Trading Member - Clearing Member) and PCM (Professional Clearing Member)

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** TM-CM can trade and clear for themselves AND clear for other TMs. PCM can clear for TMs (but cannot trade). SCM can only clear for themselves. So both TM-CM and PCM can clear for other TMs.
**The Trap:** SCM cannot clear for others - "Self" means only for their own trades. Not all clearing members can clear for others.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Member category rights and limitations are frequently tested.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Clear for others: TM-CM and PCM. Self-only: SCM. No clearing: plain TM.
